arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the internet gateway.

attachments.description: A list of attachments showing the state and VPC ID associated with the internet gateway.

id.description: The unique identifier of the internet gateway.

internet_gateway_id.description: The ID of the internet gateway.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the internet gateway.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the internet gateway.
